name: azdoctor-server
description: AZ Doctor MCP Server — Azure diagnostic orchestration, correlation, and RCA generation

scripts.build: tsc && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=build/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
